query.description: Select transactions by 1-based index/line_limit, or exactly match an AXI channel handshake time.
query.x-description-zh: Select transactions by 1-based index/line_limit, or exactly match an AXI channel handshake time.

time_unit.description: 仅解释不带单位的时间数字；带单位时间字符串优先，auto 不改变带单位值。
time_unit.x-description-zh: 仅解释不带单位的时间数字；带单位时间字符串优先，auto 不改变带单位值。

description: Query AXI channels and reconstructed transactions.
x-how_it_works: 第 N 个 transaction 用 1-based query.index，多条用 query.line_limit；已知锚点时用 query.channel（AW/W/B/AR/R）与精确 query.handshake_time 反查。逐 beat payload 仅由 output.include_data 展开。
x-when_to_use: 抽取 AXI beat/transaction 或从握手时间反查整笔事务。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: name; channel and handshake_time must appear together; do not mix handshake query with transaction selectors

use_when: 需要执行该 action 的 catalog 所述能力。
do_not_use_when: 任务不属于该 action 的公开合同。
constraints: required: name; channel and handshake_time must appear together; do not mix handshake query with transaction selectors
